name: Handleman Company
description: Handleman Company was a category manager and distributor of music, video, and software products to major retailers, primarily in the United States, Canada, and the United Kingdom. Founded in 1934, the company provided a full range of services including selection, acquisition, distribution, and in-store merchandising of home entertainment products. After facing significant industry shifts from physical media to digital distribution, the company liquidated its assets and ceased operations in 2008.
